Package neqsim.process.equipment.compressor

Class CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.ScanResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.compressor.CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.ScanResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:

Scan result.

  • Constructor Details

    • ScanResult

      public ScanResult(String applicationName, CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.OperatingMode operatingMode, CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.SequenceState sequenceState, CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.ApplicationStatus status, double time, List<CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.StageDecision> stageDecisions, List<CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.HeaderDecision> headerDecisions, List<CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.OperatorDiagnostic> diagnostics, CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.CertificationStatus certificationStatus)
      Create scan result.
      Parameters:
      applicationName - application name
      operatingMode - operating mode
      sequenceState - sequence state
      status - status
      time - scan time in seconds
      stageDecisions - stage decisions
      headerDecisions - header decisions
      diagnostics - diagnostics
      certificationStatus - certification status
